meaning: n.[地质] 角砾云橄岩,金伯利岩(含金刚石)
examples: Researchers recently found kimberlite deposits hinting at the existence of diamonds.
Results of the paper show that gold is the by-product of diamond deposits in kimberlite pipes.
The general run of kimberlite zone composed by kimberlite body which is found at present is NNE.
The kimberlite eruption that occurred there about 53.3 million years ago opened a hole in the Earth's surface, sucking in some of those redwoods.
